message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram
    participant Smart Proxy
    participant 3Scale
    participant Insights operator
        participant Control logic
        participant IO memory cache
        participant CRD
        participant OCP WebConsole

    note over Insights operator: Sequence diagram for the whole CCX (external) data pipeline

    Smart Proxy -> Insights operator: Pulling data from Smart Proxy
    Insights operator -> 3Scale: Get recommendations org ID cluster ID
    3Scale -> Insights operator: Get recommendations org ID cluster ID
    Insights operator -> 3Scale: Recommendations for cluster
    3Scale -> Insights operator: Recommendations for cluster

    note over Insights operator: Exposing recommendations
    Insights operator -> IO memory cache: Store recommendations
    Insights operator -> CRD: Expose recommendations

    note over Insights operator: Pulling from OCP WebConsole
    Insights operator -> CRD: Read recommendations
    Insights operator -> OCP WebConsole: Here are required data

    Smart Proxy..-- 3Scale
    Insights operator..-- Control logic
    Insights operator..-- IO memory cache
    Insights operator..-- CRD
    Insights operator..-- OCP WebConsole

    note right of Insights operator: Insights operator
    note right of Control logic: Control logic
    note right of IO memory cache: IO memory cache
    note right of CRD: CRD
    note right of OCP WebConsole: OCP WebConsole

    note right of Smart Proxy: Smart Proxy
    note right of 3Scale: 3Scale

    note right of Insights operator: Sequence diagram for the whole CCX (external) data pipeline
    note right of Control logic: Copyright © 2020 Red Hat, Inc. Author: Pavel Tisnovsky
@enduml
